name: Get the Sold Google Leads for PBC

content.query:
Select 
lds_user_3 as "Google Click ID",
dsp_id as "Conversion Name",
convert(varchar,ContractDate, 112) as "Conversion Time",
GSA as "Conversion Value",
'USD' "Conversion Currency",
dsp_id as "Disposition"
from 
ODS.LP_PBC_Lds_Leads T1 
left join ODS.LP_PBC_job_Jobs T2 
on T1.id = T2.lds_id
where 
lds_user_3 <> ''
